analysis.reasoning: Core message: Global challenges require cooperation; portraying those who see China as a rival and incite conflict as undermining collective solutions and harming all. Evaluation: CH1 – Implicitly frames (primarily Western) actors who cast China as a rival as hostile/divisive; this aligns with depicting the West as antagonistic toward China, so CH1 is supported. CH2 – By arguing rivalry with China harms global synergy and implying cooperation with China is needed to solve shared problems, it casts China as a cooperative, benevolent partner in multilateral solutions; thus CH2 is supported. CH3 – No historical or adversity content. CH4 – No claim about China’s domestic political system or values. CH5 – No reference to CCP governance successes. CH6 – Not cultural. Conclusion: CH1 and CH2 apply.
